steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: In 2012, $a$ is the number of advanced riders and $b$ is the number of recreational riders. A 47% increase means multiply the advanced group by $1.47$, and a 38% increase means multiply the recreational group by $1.38$.

steps.title: Write the total after growth
steps.content: The 2012 total was $40$, and the total number of riders increased by 43%, so the 2022 total is $40(1.43)$. The sum of the two 2022 group counts is $1.47a + 1.38b$, so the equation should be $$1.47a + 1.38b = 40(1.43).$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice C (‘$1.47a + 1.38b = 40(1.43)$’) is the only choice that puts $1.47$ with $a$, $1.38$ with $b$, and $1.43$ with the total. Therefore, C is correct.
